prompt: A Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style scene showing a tailor workshop. A mannequin wearing an extremely tight and perfectly stitched kimono with intricate patterns, while a real person struggles to wear a similar kimono that is too tight and slightly tearing. Use flat colors, strong outlines, minimal shading, traditional Japanese composition, muted indigo and beige tones, visible woodblock texture. No modern elements. Edo period aesthetic.
tradition_approach: Used flat colors, bold outlines, minimal shading, and traditional composition to reflect ukiyo-e grammar while depicting overfitting through clothing misfit.
